explanation: This command attempts to set a Windows Defender exclusion path using WMIC. It matches the Sigma rule by including the specific namespace and is a valid test command for the rule.
This is a variation of the original command with single quotes instead of double quotes. It uses the same namespace and path, making it a valid test command that matches the Sigma rule.
This command omits the quotation marks around the path. Since the path does not contain spaces, it is still valid and matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command uses escaped quotes around the namespace parameter. It is a valid mutation that still matches the Sigma rule.
This command uses an environment variable (%TEMP%) and path traversal to obfuscate the path. It still matches the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
